author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added pick_greedy_pair() heuristic to einsum_pairwise: score every (i, j) pair by intermediate size (product of dim sizes for labels in i∪j needed downstream or in output), pick smallest, reorder, contract. Mirrors numpy's optimize='greedy'.

Trade-off vs optimal: greedy is O(N^3) per step; optimal is O(2^N) - for typical N ≤ 8 case greedy gets within a constant factor at far less planning cost.

1 test verifying 'ab,bc,cd,de->ae' on 2x2 mixed operands produces analytical chain product. ferray-linalg: 21 -> 22 einsum tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit c4149e68.
